title: Store Staff
searchPlaceholder: Search username, name, email, or phone

currentStore.label: Current store
currentStore.helper: All staff accounts stay bound to the current store and always use the StoreStaff role.

fields.fixedRoleHint: The role stays fixed as {{role}}. Role changes and cross-store assignments are not available here.

messages.noAccessDescription: The current account is not a StoreManager, or it does not have usable user-management permissions.
messages.selectStoreDescription: Choose a store before viewing or managing staff accounts for that store.
messages.loadFailedDescription: Try again later or pull to refresh.
messages.emptyDescription: Use the action button to create a staff account for the current store.
messages.saveFailed: Failed to save the staff account
messages.statusFailed: Failed to update the staff status
